title: dryopteris camporum
intro: Dryopteris camporum, also known as the Mountain Wood Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. It is native to North America and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris camporum include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Dryopteris camporum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in capsule or tincture form, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
